mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.group_id AS "group.id", a.type AS "type", a.money AS "money", a.symonet AS "symonet", a.count AS "count", a.sycount AS "sycount", a.info AS "info", a.zsid AS "zsid", a.tui_money AS "tuiMoney", a.tui_time AS "tuiTime", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex", `user`.nickname AS "zsname",
`group`.name AS "group.name", `group`.idno AS "group.idno"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_group `group` ON `group`.id = a.group_id LEFT JOIN t_member `user` ON `user`.id = a.zsid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_group_hongbao( id, uid, group_id, type, money, symonet, count, sycount, info, zsid, tui_money, tui_time, del_flag, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{group.id}, #{type}, #{money}, #{symonet}, #{count}, #{sycount}, #{info}, #{zsid}, #{tuiMoney}, #{tuiTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_group_hongbao SET uid = #{u.id}, group_id = #{group.id}, type = #{type}, money = #{money}, symonet = #{symonet}, count = #{count}, sycount = #{sycount}, info = #{info}, zsid = #{zsid}, tui_money = #{tuiMoney}, tui_time = #{tuiTime}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
